name: Attack on Titan RPG
description:
Welcome to the world of Attack on Titan, where you'll embody a brave soldier from the Survey Corps. Engage in thrilling battles against Titans, uncover secrets, and make impactful decisions. Will you become a hero and defend humanity or succumb to despair? Get ready for an immersive RPG experience filled with action and suspense!

(Work in Progress)
creator: Tekaruu
